last_action: Compiled and benchmarked ChainedBatchStateTransition circuit across 7 configurations (depth 10/20/32, batch 4/8/16). Derived precise constraint formula. Evaluated hypothesis.
next_action: Hypothesis partially rejected: 100K constraint target infeasible, but 60s proving time achievable with rapidsnark. Ready for downstream pipeline (Logicist formalization). Consider Stage 3 (adversarial scenarios) if deeper analysis is needed.
hypothesis_details: 100K constraint target REJECTED (batch 64 needs 2.2M). 60s proving time CONFIRMED with rapidsnark (est. 14-35s), REJECTED with snarkjs (est. 142s).
